actualOutcome: Replaced CodeMirror with React Ace editor for refined editing experience. Created custom Ace theme matching Pane's aesthetic. Geist Mono font properly configured. Production build successful.

data.description: Switching from CodeMirror 6 to React Ace for editor component
data.why: CodeMirror not delivering refined editing experience. React Ace provides Cloud9-level quality at 500KB vs Monaco 5-10MB. Right balance for Pane.
data.alternatives: Monaco Editor (too heavy), keep CodeMirror (compromised quality)
data.philosophy_applied: Start simple add complexity when needed, quality in everything, refuse to settle

data.description: Successfully migrated Pane from CodeMirror 6 to React Ace editor
data.package_changes: removed @codemirror/* packages, added react-ace and ace-builds
data.theme: Custom Pane theme matching existing color system
data.font: Geist Mono configured in Ace options

data.summary: Replaced CodeMirror with React Ace editor for refined editing experience. Created custom Ace theme matching Pane's aesthetic. Geist Mono font properly configured. Production build successful.
